title: Create Confluence
description: What if you did Minecraft + Terraria + Create?
body:
A lightweight modpack for Minecraft 1.21.1 that mixes the best of Minecraft and Terraria, with just enough mods to keep things fresh without overloading your system.

The two main mods in this pack are:

- [Confluence: Otherworld](https://modrinth.com/mod/confluence), which basically adds a huge Terraria-style twist to Minecraft. New underground biomes, cool structures, unique enemies, and tons of new resources to find. If you’ve ever wanted that classic Terraria exploration and progression vibe inside Minecraft — this is it.

- [Create 6](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), the latest version of the awesome engineering mod that lets you build crazy machines, farms, and all kinds of contraptions using gears, belts, and rotational power. Super satisfying if you love automation and messing around with cool builds.

We kept this pack lightweight on purpose — it runs well even on average PCs, but still adds enough content to completely change how you play, whether you're exploring, fighting, or building.

I've been playing this with some friends for a few weeks now, and it's been a ton of fun. Between diving into the Terraria-like underground and building ridiculous Create machines, there's always something new to do.

**If you love both Minecraft and Terraria, and you want a chill but fun modded experience, give this pack a try. Hope you enjoy it as much as we did!**
